demo.title: twitter-agent.sh
demo.code:
# Build your agent's personality interactively
bankr prompt "using the twitter-agent skill, help me build my personality"

# Post a new tweet in character
bankr prompt "using the twitter-agent skill, draft a tweet and post it"

# Check mentions and reply in character
bankr prompt "using the twitter-agent skill, check mentions and reply"

# Set up automated daily posting
bankr prompt "using the twitter-agent skill, set up a morning post automation"

setup: Set `X_API_KEY`, `X_API_KEY_SECRET`, `X_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET` env vars from the [X Developer Portal](https://developer.x.com)
Link Telegram to Bankr for approval routing on guarded drafts
Run the skill manually 5–10 times before enabling automations
